message:
spec-evolution viewer: restore full CSS + harden patch replay for huge docs

Fixes two classes of failure seen in Cloudflare Pages deployment:

- Runtime crash: deployed build referenced "row" without defining it in applySynapticPatch(), causing immediate blank-screen (REANIMATION_FAILURE: row is not defined).

- Large-doc stack blowups: replace array clone via spread ([...lines]) with lines.slice() and cap splice insertion to CHUNK_SIZE=5000 with chunked inserts.

Also restores the complete inlined stylesheet (removes placeholder "/* ... (skipping unchanged parts) ... */") and fixes responsive table CSS selector so the UI renders with intended styling.
